metadata.description: Citation templates and formats for testing citation quality
metadata.author: SecondBrain Testing Framework

citation_formats.name: APA
citation_formats.example: Author, A. A. (Year). Title of work. Publisher.

citation_formats.name: MLA
citation_formats.example: Author, Author. Title of Work. Publisher, Year.

citation_formats.name: Chicago
citation_formats.example: Author, Author. Title of Work. Place: Publisher, Year.

citation_formats.name: IEEE
citation_formats.description: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers style
citation_formats.example: [1] Author, "Title," Journal, vol. x, no. x, pp. xxx-xxx, Year.

input.title: Clean Code: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship
input.author: Robert C. Martin

expected.apa: Martin, R. C. (2008). Clean Code: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship. Prentice Hall.
expected.mla: Martin, Robert C. Clean Code: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship. Prentice Hall, 2008.
expected.chicago: Martin, Robert C. Clean Code: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship. Upper Saddle River, NJ: Prentice Hall, 2008.

input.title: Attention Is All You Need
input.journal: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems

expected.apa: Vaswani, A., Shazeer, N., Parmar, N., & Uszkoreit, J. (2017). Attention Is All You Need. Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, 30, 5998-6008.
expected.ieee: [1] A. Vaswani, N. Shazeer, N. Parmar, and J. Uszkoreit, "Attention Is All You Need," Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, vol. 30, pp. 5998-6008, 2017.

expected.apa: Python Software Foundation. (n.d.). Python Documentation. Retrieved April 12, 2026, from https://docs.python.org/3/
Tech Blog. (n.d.). Understanding Vector Search. Retrieved from https://example.com/vector-search
expected.note: Use publisher or site name when author is unknown

expected.apa: Example Corp. (n.d.). API Reference. Retrieved from https://example.com/api
Gamma, E., Helm, R., Johnson, R., & Vlissides, J. (1994). Design Patterns. Addison-Wesley.
expected.mla: Gamma, Erich, et al. Design Patterns. Addison-Wesley, 1994.
expected.note: Use 'et al.' for 3+ authors in MLA

test_cases.description: Detect and handle invalid citation formats
Citation for PDF document from research repository

expected.apa: Developer Team. (2026). SecondBrain: Local Document Intelligence Architecture [PDF]. GitHub. https://github.com/example/secondbrain/docs/architecture.pdf

validation_rules.description: Author or creator should be present when possible
URLs must be valid and accessible
Dates should follow ISO 8601 or standard format
Same source should not be cited multiple times unnecessarily
